description: Add dramatic, per-archetype visual effects and animations when powers activate on the board. Each archetype gets a unique visual treatment: Martial (card spin), Skulker (side glow + particle burst), Caster (omen aura wash), Devout (ward shield on protected card), Intimidate (target card shudder + crack). Replaces the current generic amber callout with distinct per-power feedback.

userStories.title: Extend LastMoveInfo with archetype detail fields for frontend
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want the API to return enough detail about archetype usage to drive per-power animations -- so the UI knows which side was boosted, which direction was rotated, etc.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `skulker_boost_side: str | None = None` field to `LastMoveInfo` in `app/models/game.py`
Add `martial_rotation_direction: str | None = None` field to `LastMoveInfo`
Add `devout_ward_cell: int | None = None` field to `LastMoveInfo` (if not already added in power-refactor sprint)
In `apply_intent()`, populate these fields from the intent when the corresponding archetype is activated
Regenerate frontend API types (`api-types.generated.ts`)
Add test: LastMoveInfo includes skulker_boost_side when Skulker is used
Add test: LastMoveInfo includes martial_rotation_direction when Martial is used
`uv run pytest` passes
`uv run pyright` passes

userStories.title: Martial effect: card spin animation
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see my card visually spin when I use Martial -- so the rotation feels impactful and clear.
acceptanceCriteria: In `BoardGrid.tsx`, when a placed card used Martial: animate a 90-degree rotation (CW or CCW based on `martial_rotation_direction`) before the card settles into its final position
Animation: card rotates from its pre-rotation orientation to final orientation over ~0.4s with a slight overshoot (spring feel)
The card values shown are the POST-rotation values (the animation is purely visual -- values update at the end)
Add a subtle whoosh/sweep ring effect around the card during rotation
Update BoardCallouts archetype callout to say 'Martial Spin!' instead of generic 'Martial!'
Add DevPlayground scenario for Martial spin (both CW and CCW)
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: Skulker effect: side glow + boost burst
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see the boosted side glow with a '+3' particle when I use Skulker -- so I can see exactly which edge got stronger.
acceptanceCriteria: In `BoardGrid.tsx` or a new `PowerEffects.tsx` component, when a placed card used Skulker: highlight the boosted edge (N/E/S/W) of the card with a bright glow
Show a '+3' text particle that pops out from the boosted edge and fades
The boosted edge glows green/emerald for ~1.5s then fades
Edge identification: use `skulker_boost_side` from LastMoveInfo to determine which edge (top/right/bottom/left of the card cell)
Update BoardCallouts to say 'Skulker +3!' instead of generic 'Skulker!'
Add DevPlayground scenario for Skulker boost on each side
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: Caster effect: omen aura wash
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see a purple omen energy wash over my card when I use Caster -- so the guaranteed +2 feels powerful and mystical.
acceptanceCriteria: In `BoardGrid.tsx`, when a placed card used Caster: play an omen-themed aura animation on the placed cell
Animation: a purple/violet radial pulse expands from the card center, then a persistent subtle purple shimmer for ~2s
Show '+2 all sides' text callout integrated with the effect
The Mists callout should still show 'Omen +2' as usual (Caster effect is additive visual, not replacing Mists callout)
Update BoardCallouts archetype text to 'Caster Omen!' with purple styling instead of amber
Add DevPlayground scenario for Caster activation
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: Devout effect: ward shield on protected card
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see a glowing shield/barrier appear on my warded card -- so it's obvious which card is protected and that the protection is active.
acceptanceCriteria: In `BoardGrid.tsx`, when `game.warded_cell` is set and owned by the current viewer: render a shield overlay on that cell
Shield visual: a semi-transparent golden/holy barrier with a subtle breathing pulse animation
Shield persists until the ward expires (after opponent's next placement) -- use `warded_cell` from GameState
When the ward is first applied: play a 'shield up' animation (golden ring expanding outward from the card)
When the ward expires (next state update where warded_cell is null): play a 'shield down' fade-out
Update BoardCallouts to say 'Ward!' with a golden/holy color scheme
Add DevPlayground scenario for Devout ward (showing shield on a card)
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: Intimidate effect: target card shudder + debuff flash
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see the targeted enemy card shudder and flash red when I use Intimidate -- so the debuff feels aggressive and the target is obvious.
acceptanceCriteria: In `BoardGrid.tsx`, when a placement used Intimidate: animate the `intimidate_target_cell` card with a shudder (rapid horizontal shake) and a red flash overlay
Show a '-3' text particle popping off the debuffed edge of the target card, colored red
The shudder animation plays before capture resolution animations (so the player sees the debuff THEN the capture)
Animation timing: shudder ~0.3s, then red flash ~0.2s, then normal capture flow
Update BoardCallouts to say 'Intimidate -3!' with a red/orange color scheme instead of amber
Add DevPlayground scenario for Intimidate (showing target shudder + debuff)
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: Archetype sound effects
userStories.description: As a player, I want each archetype to play a distinct sound when activated -- so the audio feedback matches the visual.
acceptanceCriteria: Add archetype sound functions to `web/src/lib/sounds.ts`: `playMartial()`, `playSkulker()`, `playCaster()`, `playDevout()`, `playIntimidate()`
Each produces a short, distinct synthesized tone using the existing Web Audio pattern in sounds.ts (no audio file assets needed)
Martial: quick rising sweep (whoosh feel). Skulker: sharp staccato burst. Caster: deep resonant hum. Devout: gentle chime/bell. Intimidate: low aggressive rumble
Trigger the appropriate sound when `archetypeUsedName` is detected in the move update
Respect existing mute toggle
Update sound mocks in test helpers if needed
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes

userStories.title: DevPlayground: complete archetype effects showcase
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a DevPlayground section that showcases all 5 archetype effects side by side -- so I can quickly iterate on visual tuning.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update DevPlayground scenarios to cover all 5 archetype effects with proper LastMoveInfo fields
Each scenario demonstrates the full animation chain: archetype callout + cell effect + capture resolution
Scenario labels clearly identify which archetype is being demonstrated
Existing archetype scenario (case 14) is replaced or updated with the new per-archetype variants
`cd web && bun run test --run` passes
